title: casparya umbellata
intro: Casparya umbellata, also known as Matricaria discoidea, is a flowering plant in the daisy family, typically found in dry areas and is native to North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can aid in treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and relieving respiratory problems, such as congestion and coughs. Casparya umbellata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
